title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Record of the Year Odds and Predictions
text: Kendrick Lamar enters the 68th Annual Grammy Awards as the frontrunner for Record of the Year with his collaboration "Luther" featuring SZA. According to William Hill Vegas, this positioning could mark a significant milestone in the Compton rapper's career. Betting Favorites: Luther (Kendrick Lamar ft. SZA): 4/5, APT (ROSE & Bruno Mars): 4/1, Abracadabra (Lady Gaga): 9/2, DtMF (Bad Bunny): 11/2. Path to Grammy History: "Luther" also appears in the Song of the Year race at 5/1 odds. Should Kendrick win both categories, he would accumulate 24 total Grammy Awards, equaling Kanye West's count and positioning himself among the most decorated artists in the award's history. "If that happens, he'd draw level with Kanye West on 24 Grammys, which would be a massive moment in terms of legacy," according to William Hill spokesperson Lee Phelps. Competition: Kendrick faces strong competition from major international artists including Bruno Mars, Lady Gaga, and Bad Bunny across various categories.
